summary: Cathy O'Neil announces that her algorithmic auditing company ORCAA was featured in Wired magazine. The article by Jessi Hempel covers ORCAA's first customer engagement auditing Rentlogic. This brief post serves as an announcement directing readers to the full Wired piece about algorithmic accountability in business.
key_points: ORCAA (O'Neil Risk Consulting & Algorithmic Auditing) received mainstream media coverage in Wired
Rentlogic was ORCAA's first customer for algorithmic auditing services
The Wired article frames algorithmic auditing as a way for businesses to prove fairness
money_quotes: WANT TO PROVE YOUR BUSINESS IS FAIR? AUDIT YOUR ALGORITHM
key_insight: Algorithmic auditing is emerging as a viable business service that companies can use to demonstrate the fairness of their automated systems.
